title: TerraFirma 筹集 1.15 亿美元用于建设建筑机器人基础设施
summary: TerraFirma has developed a platform that combines AI-enabled software, a remote command-and-control center, and retrofitted heavy machinery. The post TerraFirma raises $115M to build robotic infrastructure for construction appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：TerraFirma raises $115M to build robotic infrastructure for construction）
